question.content: For the self-biased FET common-source circuit with UGS_off=-4 V and IDSS=4 mA, find Q point and dynamic parameters. Output exactly six comma-separated values in the order IDQ_mA,UGSQ_V,UDSQ_V,Au,Ri_MOhm,Ro_kOhm, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Use load-line plus transfer-line intersection to locate Q point.
step_1.key_point: Load-line plus transfer-line intersection to locate Q point.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 5 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the governing relation for Q point and dynamic parameters.

step_5.content: Analyze panel 2 of 5 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_5.key_point: Transform the relation and isolate Q point and dynamic parameters.

step_7.content: Analyze panel 3 of 5 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_7.key_point: Substitute required values/constants to obtain Q point and dynamic parameters.

step_9.content: Analyze panel 4 of 5 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_9.key_point: Keep the final canonical form of Q point and dynamic parameters.

step_11.content: Compute gm and then Au, Ri, Ro and output in order.
step_11.key_point: Compute gm and then derive Au, Ri, and Ro.
